title: Join Our International Alumni Community and Share Your Story
summary: Reconnect with the international alumni community of the ELTE Faculty of Informatics and remain part of a network that continues beyond graduation.
body: Your ELTE journey didn’t end with graduation. Join a growing international alumni network where your story, your career, and your experience truly matter. Inspire the next generation with your story! Why join the ELTE International Alumni Community? Reconnect with a global network of professionals Gain visibility for your career and achievements Stay connected to opportunities, events, and collaborations Inspire future ELTE students with your story
